arabic: الْمَجْلِسُ غُرْفَةٌ خَاصَّةٌ فِي الْبَيْتِ الْعَرَبِيِّ تُخَصَّصُ لِاسْتِقْبَالِ الضُّيُوفِ. يَجْلِسُ الرِّجَالُ فِيهِ وَيَتَحَدَّثُونَ عَنِ الْأُمُورِ الْمُهِمَّةِ. تُزَيَّنُ جُدْرَانُ الْمَجْلِسِ بِالسِّجَادِ الْجَمِيلِ وَالْوِسَادِ الْوَثِيرَةِ. يُقَدِّمُ صَاحِبُ الْبَيْتِ الْقَهْوَةَ وَالتَّمْرَ لِكُلِّ مَنْ يَدْخُلُ الْمَجْلِسَ.
translation: Madžlis je posebna prostorija u arapskom domu namijenjena primanju gostiju. Muškarci sjede u njoj i razgovaraju o važnim pitanjima. Zidovi madžlisa ukrašeni su lijepim tepisima i udobnim jastucima. Domaćin nudi kafu i hurme svakom ko uđe u madžlis.
translationEn: The majlis is a special room in an Arab home dedicated to receiving guests. Men sit there and discuss important matters. The walls of the majlis are decorated with beautiful carpets and comfortable cushions. The host offers coffee and dates to everyone who enters the majlis.
